# Generated Files & Post-Change Guardrails

Hard guardrails — breaking these breaks the build or translation pipeline.

- **Never edit `types/` or `dist/` directly** — auto-generated. Edit source `.js`, then `npm run ts-build` (types) / `npm run build:prod` (dist).
- **`src/langs/`: edit `en.js` only** — other language files are auto-translated. Then `npm run check:langs`.
- **Never edit auto-generated marker sections** in `src/typedef.js` and `src/core/schema/options.js` (regenerated by `npm run check:inject`).
- **Three-file export sync**: `src/suneditor.js`, `webpack/cdn-builder.js`, `scripts/ts-build/format-index.cjs` must stay in sync → `npm run check:exports`.
- **After modifying code, update `changes.md`** — user-facing changes only (`feat`/`fix`/`change`/`breaking`); skip `style`/`docs`/`test`/`chore`/`ci`/`build`. Format rules: `prompts/changes-guide.md`.

Full detail: `prompts/editing-rules.md`.
